Grad Cafe Module 4
  • API Reference
  • View page source

API Reference

Flask Application

Flask application factory for the Grad Cafe analytics service.

class src.app.BusyState[source]

Small observable state container used to gate button requests.

src.app.create_app(*, scraper: Callable[[], Iterable[Dict[str, Any]]] | None = None, loader: Callable[[Iterable[Dict[str, Any]]], int] | None = None, query_runner: Callable[[], List[Dict[str, Any]]] | None = None, busy_state: BusyState | None = None, testing: bool = False) → Flask[source]

Create a configured Flask app with injectable data and analysis dependencies.

src.app.default_loader(records: Iterable[Dict[str, Any]]) → int[source]

Load scraped records into PostgreSQL using the Module 3 schema.

src.app.default_scraper() → List[Dict[str, Any]][source]

Read the submitted Module 2 records used as the deterministic local source.

Database Connections

Data Loading

src.load_data.first_present(record: Dict[str, Any], *keys: str) → str | None[source]

Return the first populated value from alternate scraper/LLM field names.

src.load_data.normalize_record(record: Dict[str, Any], p_id: int) → Dict[str, Any][source]

Convert one JSON applicant record into the columns expected by PostgreSQL.

src.load_data.parse_date(value: str | None) → str | None[source]

Accept the date formats produced by the scraper and normalize them for PostgreSQL.

src.load_data.parse_float(value: Any) → float | None[source]

Extract a numeric value from fields that may include labels or extra text.

Analysis Queries

class src.query_data.AnalysisQuestion(key: str, question: str, sql: str, explanation: str, value_field: str = 'answer')[source]
src.query_data.empty_analysis_results() → List[Dict[str, Any]][source]

Return a deterministic fallback result so the page still renders an Answer label.

src.query_data.expected_result_keys() → set[str][source]

Return the keys every analysis result dictionary exposes to templates.

src.query_data.format_result(question: AnalysisQuestion, row: Dict[str, Any] | None, rows: List[Dict[str, Any]]) → str[source]

Turn raw SQL rows into short answers that read well in all outputs.

Pipeline Scrape Script

The original scraper script is retained under src/pipeline/scrape.py for the Grad Cafe data collection workflow.

Pipeline Clean Script

The original cleaner script is retained under src/pipeline/clean.py for normalizing scraped data before loading.
